title: . Opportunity for education. If the househelper is under the age of eighteen (18) years, the
content:
. Opportunity for education. If the househelper is under the age of eighteen (18) years, the 
employer shall give him or her an opportunity for at least elementary education. The cost of education shall be 
part of the househelper’s compensation, unless there is a stipulation to the contrary.
